ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parishes" (
  "parish_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parish */,
  "parish_est_year" INTEGER /* Year the parish was established */,
  "church_name" TEXT /* Name of the church associated with the parish */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the parish is located */,
  "current_bldg_began" INTEGER /* Year the current building construction began */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or references about the parish */,
  "parish_type" TEXT /* Type of parish (e.g., urban, rural, suburban) */,
  "parish_status" TEXT /* Current status of the parish (e.g., active, closed, under renovation) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the parish record was updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the parish record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parish_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "church_buildings" (
  "bldg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each church building */,
  "parish_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parish the building belongs to */,
  "bldg_began" INTEGER /* Year the building construction began */,
  "bldg_completed" INTEGER /* Year the building construction was completed */,
  "architect" TEXT /* Name of the architect who designed the building */,
  "construction_cost" REAL /* Total construction cost of the building */,
  "last_renovation" INTEGER /* Year of the last major renovation */,
  "bldg_status" TEXT /* Status of the building (e.g., in use, under renovation, decommissioned) */,
  "last_inspection" TEXT /* Date of the last building inspection */,
  "next_inspection_due" TEXT /* Date when the next inspection is due */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the building record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bldg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_church_buildings_parish_id FOREIGN KEY ("parish_id") REFERENCES parishes ("parish_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "parish_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parish the record belongs to */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial record */,
  "record_type" TEXT /* Type of financial record (e.g., weekly collection, donation) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the financial record */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial record */,
  "estimated_amount" REAL /* Estimated amount for the financial record */,
  "actual_amount" REAL /* Actual amount for the financial record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the financial record (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the financial record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_records_parish_id FOREIGN KEY ("parish_id") REFERENCES parishes ("parish_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parish_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parish manager */,
  "parish_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parish the manager is responsible for */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the parish manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the parish manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the parish manager */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the manager started their role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the manager ended their role (if applicable) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the manager (e.g., rector, associate rector) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the manager (e.g., active, on leave, terminated) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the manager record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parish_managers_parish_id FOREIGN KEY ("parish_id") REFERENCES parishes ("parish_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial officer */,
  "parish_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parish the officer is responsible for */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the financial officer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the financial officer */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the officer started their role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the officer ended their role (if applicable) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the financial officer (e.g., treasurer, assistant treasurer) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the financial officer (e.g., active, on leave, terminated) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the officer record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_officers_parish_id FOREIGN KEY ("parish_id") REFERENCES parishes ("parish_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the administrator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator (e.g., regional manager, financial director) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the administrator belongs to (e.g., finance, operations) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the administrator (e.g., active, on leave, terminated) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the administrator record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parish_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "parish_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parish the note belongs to */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was added */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference or source of the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., historical, administrative, financial) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the note (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the note record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parish_notes_parish_id FOREIGN KEY ("parish_id") REFERENCES parishes ("parish_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parish_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "parish_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parish where the event was held */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., mass, charity event) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "attendees" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "event_cost" REAL /* Cost of the event */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the event (e.g., parish budget, external sponsors) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., planned, completed, canceled) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the event record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parish_events_parish_id FOREIGN KEY ("parish_id") REFERENCES parishes ("parish_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parish_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parish member */,
  "parish_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parish the member belongs to */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the parish member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the parish member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the parish member */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the member joined the parish */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the member (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "member_type" TEXT /* Type of member (e.g., adult, child, senior) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the member record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parish_members_parish_id FOREIGN KEY ("parish_id") REFERENCES parishes ("parish_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parish_donations" (
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donation */,
  "parish_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parish the donation was made to */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the donor who made the donation */,
  "donation_date" TEXT /* Date the donation was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the donation */,
  "donation_type" TEXT /* Type of donation (e.g., cash, check) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the donation */,
  "donation_status" TEXT /* Status of the donation (e.g., pending, received, refunded) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the donation record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parish_donations_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parish_donations_parish_id FOREIGN KEY ("parish_id") REFERENCES parishes ("parish_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donors" (
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donor */,
  "donor_name" TEXT /* Name of the donor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the donor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the donor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the donor */,
  "donor_type" TEXT /* Type of donor (e.g., individual, organization) */,
  "donor_status" TEXT /* Status of the donor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_donation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last donation made by the donor */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the donor record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parish_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "parish_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parish the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., financial, membership) */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final, archived) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the report record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parish_reports_parish_id FOREIGN KEY ("parish_id") REFERENCES parishes ("parish_id")
)
